SMILE INDEX: 72
WINDOW: 1007.033s to 1042.800s (smile at 1027.033s to 1027.800s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army. And we retreated, my formation, the battalion. All we did--

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
of

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army. And we retreated, my formation, the battalion. All we did--
